item.name: Encrypted Tomestone
item.description: While Garlond Ironworks engineers insist tomestones contain reams of invaluable information gathered by the lost Allagan Empire, even they are at a loss how to decipher the content of this particular one. This variety is not as highly sought as it once was, and may no longer be exchanged for other wares.

obj.n: The Final Coil of Bahamut - Turn 2
